mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mall_cart (user_id, product_id, sku_id, quantity, checked, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mall_cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.product_id, c.sku_id, p.product_name, p.main_image, s.sku_name, s.sale_price, c.quantity, c.checked, (s.stock - s.lock_stock) AS available_stock, p.status AS product_status, s.status AS sku_status FROM mall_cart c INNER JOIN mall_product p ON c.product_id = p.id INNER JOIN mall_product_sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.update_time DESC

SELECT c.sku_id, c.product_id, p.product_name, s.sku_name, p.main_image, s.sale_price, c.quantity, (s.sale_price * c.quantity) AS line_total FROM mall_cart c INNER JOIN mall_product p ON c.product_id = p.id INNER JOIN mall_product_sku s ON c.sku_id = s.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.checked = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND s.status = 1 ORDER BY c.update_time DESC
